retrieved_result: Man's Samsung Galaxy S4 catches fire while charging as he slept, leaving him waking in cloud of smoke "News Man's Samsung Galaxy S4 catches fire while charging as he slept, leaving him waking in cloud of smoke The stunned 57-year-old said: ""When I opened my eyes all I could see was smoke. I turned to my bedside table and all I could see were flames coming from the phone""Share By Simon Hamalienko18
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is unrelated to database query optimization and discusses a mobile device incident.
